productName: Zoots - Gummies - Ease - CBD 20:1 - Passion Fruit Orange Guava
description: A gourmet sweet, juicy orange gummy imagined with island-grown cane sugar, orchard fruit, and the kind of small-batch technique usually reserved for handmade luxury candies. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBD to keep things calm and balanced in a 20:1 ratio. Made to help you relax and find your calm.
